burden.dalyPerCapita: high per-case disability; low population burden
burden.mortalityRate: Low with therapy; higher in untreated severe infantile forms

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical hypotonia/weakness plus genetic confirmation of SMN1 deletion

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: very limited; newborn screening not routine
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low; access to disease-modifying therapy is limited

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Genetic testing largely in urban tertiary centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Supportive care; limited access to nusinersen/risdiplam; rehab services
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: High cost, limited coverage, and delayed diagnosis
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Growing rare disease awareness and specialist networks
